evidence.log_excerpt: ERROR: Could not find a version that satisfies the requirement torch==2.1.0+cu118 ... ERROR: No matching distribution found for torch==2.1.0+cu118
supporting_context: The upstream requirements file is pinned to CUDA wheels from `https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu118`.
The current phase-1 target permits same-path CPU fallback when GPU tooling is unavailable.
The failure occurs during dependency resolution and does not disprove the standalone FireRedAsr2 AED runtime target.

diagnosis: BUILD_ENV failed because the upstream CUDA-pinned torch wheel set is not installable on the current host. A targeted retry may switch only the dependency plan to the recorded CPU fallback requirements while preserving the same repo-native runtime path.
